name: codex-aware
description: Give Codex durable semantic context from a running application.

interface.shortDescription: Point at software. Codex knows what you mean.
interface.longDescription: Attaches Codex to application-owned semantic identity, authority gates, live effects, and causal receipts.
defaultPrompt: What am I pointing at in Codex Aware?
Reveal the blast radius of my selection.
